name: My HD Tickets
report_script:
# Custom Script Report (Report.report_script) style
# Output via old-style: data = [columns, rows]

filters = filters or {}

# Be tolerant of different callers / route filters
user = (
    (filters.get("user") if isinstance(filters, dict) else None)
    or (filters.get("assigned_user") if isinstance(filters, dict) else None)
    or frappe.session.user
    or ""
).strip()

columns = [
    {"label": "Ticket", "fieldname": "ticket", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "HD Ticket", "width": 120},
    {"label": "Subject", "fieldname": "subject", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 360},
    {"label": "Status", "fieldname": "status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
    {"label": "Priority", "fieldname": "priority", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
    {"label": "Team", "fieldname": "team", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
    {"label": "Modified", "fieldname": "modified", "fieldtype": "Datetime", "width": 160},
]

if not user:
    rows = []
else:
    rows = frappe.db.sql(
        """
        SELECT
          t.name as ticket,
          t.subject,
          t.status,
          t.priority,
          t.agent_group as team,
          t.modified
        FROM `tabHD Ticket` t
        WHERE EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabToDo` td
          WHERE td.reference_type = 'HD Ticket'
            AND td.reference_name = t.name
            AND td.allocated_to = %(user)s
            AND td.status = 'Open'
        )
        ORDER BY t.modified DESC
        LIMIT 200
        """,
        {"user": user},
        as_dict=True,
    )

data = [columns, rows]

name: Unclaimed Missing Group Over 4H
query:
SELECT
  name AS "Ticket:Link/HD Ticket:90",
  subject AS "Subject::320",
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, modified, NOW()) AS "Idle Min:Int:90",
  modified AS "Last Updated:Datetime:170",
  status AS "Status::90",
  custom_service_area AS "Service Area::120",
  owner AS "Owner::160"
FROM `tabHD Ticket`
WHERE status IN ('Open','Replied')
  AND (
    IFNULL(`_assign`, '') IN ('', '[]')
    OR `_assign` = '["helpdesk@local.test"]'
  )
  AND (agent_group IS NULL OR agent_group = '')
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, modified, NOW()) >= 240
ORDER BY modified ASC
LIMIT 200;

name: Unclaimed Missing Group Over 60m
query:
SELECT
  name AS "Ticket:Link/HD Ticket:90",
  subject AS "Subject::320",
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, modified, NOW()) AS "Idle Min:Int:90",
  modified AS "Last Updated:Datetime:170",
  status AS "Status::90",
  custom_service_area AS "Service Area::120",
  owner AS "Owner::160"
FROM `tabHD Ticket`
WHERE status IN ('Open','Replied')
  AND (
    IFNULL(`_assign`, '') IN ('', '[]')
    OR `_assign` = '["helpdesk@local.test"]'
  )
  AND (agent_group IS NULL OR agent_group = '')
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, modified, NOW()) >= 60
ORDER BY modified ASC
LIMIT 200;
